_comment: researcher mode — additive. Adds fact-assertion claim words, accepts WebSearch/WebFetch (and fetch-style MCP) as verification tools, and citation/probe evidence. reReadClears stays true.
_verifyToolsNote: Only network/web retrieval counts — a LOCAL code/symbol/file search verifies no external fact, so the mcp patterns require a web/http/browser/crawl token or a known web-search-engine name (not the bare word 'search').
